# MOLT USE LIBRARY v1.0.0

This is the grouped HUMAN/library view for the USE family in the public UMG Block Library lane.

## Family role
USE blocks define what a tool, capability, method, or resource is for in practical terms.

## Use USE when you want to describe
- how something should be applied
- the practical purpose of a tool or capability
- what operational role a method serves
- the application layer of a workflow or behavior system

## Family relationship
- USE = application
- AIM = destination
- NEED = requirement
- BLUEPRINT = structure
- INSTRUCTION = procedure

## Machine-facing paired file
- `../../blocks/molt/subjects/use.library.v1.0.0.json`
